languages.text: "Вам придется посвятить меня в заговор, хотите вы этого или нет. Не так ли, Элана? Или лучше сказать... Ювенна?"
languages.translation_comment:
играет DL_KnowJuvennaTraitor
не играет DL_TraitorsConspiracy и DL_ConspiracyDenied

играет DL_KnowJuvennaTraitor
не играет DL_TraitorsConspiracy и DL_ConspiracyDenied

languages.text: "You will have to bring me in on your plot, whether you want to or not. Isn't that right, Elana? Or should I say... Juvenna?"
languages.original_text: "Вам придется посвятить меня в заговор, хотите вы этого или нет. Не так ли, Элана? Или лучше сказать... Ювенна?"

traits.locale_text: "You will have to bring me in on your plot, whether you want to or not. Isn't that right, Elana? Or should I say... Juvenna?"
"You will have to bring me in on your plot, whether you want to or not. Isn't that right, Elana? Or should I say... Juvenna?"
"You will have to bring me in on your plot, whether you want to or not. Isn't that right, Elana? Or should I say... Juvenna?"

languages.text: “不管你愿不愿意，你都必须让我参与你的谋划。你说是吧，埃拉娜？还是该叫你……尤文娜？”
languages.original_text: "You will have to bring me in on your plot, whether you want to or not. Isn't that right, Elana? Or should I say... Juvenna?"

traits.locale_text: “不管你愿不愿意，你都必须让我参与你的谋划。你说是吧，埃拉娜？还是该叫你……尤文娜？”

languages.text: « Vous allez devoir m'intégrer à votre complot, que ça vous plaise ou non. N'est-ce pas, Elana ? Ou devrais-je plutôt vous appeler... Juvenna ? »
languages.original_text: "You will have to bring me in on your plot, whether you want to or not. Isn't that right, Elana? Or should I say... Juvenna?"

traits.locale_text: « Vous allez devoir m'intégrer à votre complot, que ça vous plaise ou non. N'est-ce pas, Elana ? Ou devrais-je plutôt vous appeler... Juvenna ? »

languages.text: "İstesen de istemesen de beni kumpasına dâhil etmek zorunda kalacaksın. Öyle değil mi Elana? Yoksa... Juvenna mı demeliyim?"
languages.original_text: "You will have to bring me in on your plot, whether you want to or not. Isn't that right, Elana? Or should I say... Juvenna?"

traits.locale_text: "İstesen de istemesen de beni kumpasına dâhil etmek zorunda kalacaksın. Öyle değil mi Elana? Yoksa... Juvenna mı demeliyim?"

languages.text: «Tendrá que incluirme en su conjura, le guste o no. ¿Verdad, Elana? ¿O debería decir... Juvenna?».
languages.original_text: "You will have to bring me in on your plot, whether you want to or not. Isn't that right, Elana? Or should I say... Juvenna?"

traits.locale_text: «Tendrá que incluirme en su conjura, le guste o no. ¿Verdad, Elana? ¿O debería decir... Juvenna?».

languages.text: "Ihr werdet mich in Eure Verschwörung einweihen müssen, ob Ihr wollt oder nicht. Ist es nicht so, Elana? Oder sollte ich sagen ... Juvenna?"
languages.original_text: "You will have to bring me in on your plot, whether you want to or not. Isn't that right, Elana? Or should I say... Juvenna?"

traits.locale_text: "Ihr werdet mich in Eure Verschwörung einweihen müssen, ob Ihr wollt oder nicht. Ist es nicht so, Elana? Oder sollte ich sagen ... Juvenna?"

languages.text: 「君たちの計画に私を巻き込むことになるだろう。君たちが望むか望まなくてもね。そうだろう、エレーナ？いや、ジュヴェナ？」
languages.original_text: "You will have to bring me in on your plot, whether you want to or not. Isn't that right, Elana? Or should I say... Juvenna?"

traits.locale_text: 「君たちの計画に私を巻き込むことになるだろう。君たちが望むか望まなくてもね。そうだろう、エレーナ？いや、ジュヴェナ？」
